Uses of Class
javashooter.controller.ObjectController

Packages that use ObjectController
Package
Description
javashooter.controller
The javashooter.controller package contains Object controllers that govern an objects behavior, without being involved in its collision or drawing properties.
javashooter.gameobjects
This package contains the class GameObject and some subclasses defined for convenience and ease of use.
javashooter.playground
The package javashooter.playground contains all classes implementing and describing game levels.

  • Uses of ObjectController in javashooter.controller

    Subclasses of ObjectController in javashooter.controller
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CollisionAware4WayController
    This class controls the pacman based on used inputs.
    class 
    FollowController
     
    class 
    KinematicsController
     
    class 
    LevelController
    Ein LevelController erhält alle Inputs (Keyboard, Maus) und setzt sie in Level-Flags um.
    class 
    LimitedTimeController
    Controls an object that is deleted after a lifetime specified in the constructor, and/or when it leaves the display.
    class 
    Simple4WayController
    Simple javashooter.controller for object movable in 4 directions.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ObjectController
    GameObject.getObjectController()

  • Uses of ObjectController in javashooter.playground

    Methods in javashooter.playground with parameters of type ObjectController
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Playground.setLevelController(ObjectController ctrl)
    Installs a level javashooter.controller, i.e., a normal ObjectController instance attached to a dummy object that is invisible and has not javashooter.collider.
